basic_details.job_title: CSIR NEERI Project Associate I Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.organization_name: CSIR National Environmental Engineering Research Institute (CSIR NEERI)
basic_details.short_information: The CSIR National Environmental Engineering Research Institute (CSIR NEERI) has published the Project Associate-I Notification 2026 under Advt. No. RECRUIT_SD_8A_EHTD_25062026_B. The recruitment drive aims to fill 1 Project Associate I position on a contractual basis. Candidates up to 35 years of age and holding an M.Sc. in Microbiology, Biotechnology, or Biochemistry are eligible to attend the walk-in interview on 09-07-2026. The official notification PDF and complete walk-in details are provided below.

qualification.details: Project Associate I: M.Sc. in Microbiology/ Biotechnology/ Biochemistry from a recognized University with minimum 55% marks. Experience in gene cloning will be preferred.

salary_details.details: Rs. 31,000/- + HRA (NET/ GATE qualified) or Rs. 25,000/- + HRA (others) Per Month

_labels.notification_pdf: Download CSIR NEERI Project Associate I Job 2026 Notification PDF

all_official_links.label: Download CSIR NEERI Project Associate I Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: CSIR NEERI Nagpur Project Associate I Recruitment 2026 - Overview
CSIR NEERI Nagpur Project Associate I Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the CSIR NEERI Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download CSIR NEERI Project Associate I Job 2026 Notification PDF

CSIR NEERI Nagpur Project Associate I Eligibility Criteria 2026
content_sections.text: Project Associate I: M.Sc. in Microbiology/ Biotechnology/ Biochemistry from a recognized University with minimum 55% marks. Experience in gene cloning will be preferred.

CSIR NEERI Nagpur Project Associate I Salary 2026
content_sections.text: Rs. 31,000/- + HRA (NET/ GATE qualified) or Rs. 25,000/- + HRA (others) Per Month

content_sections.heading: CSIR NEERI Nagpur Project Associate I Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
CSIR NEERI Nagpur Project Associate I Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process
Walk-In Procedure
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to attend the walk-in interview for CSIR NEERI Project Associate I Recruitment 2026 should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before attending the interview. Candidates must report at the venue as per the reporting time mentioned in the notification. Carry all original documents along with one set of self-attested photocopies such as ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if required), and category certificate (if applicable). Bring the duly filled application form if required in the notification. Verify eligibility criteria before attending the interview. Candidates are advised to reach the venue well in advance to complete registration formalities. Keep extra passport-size photographs for submission if required.

content_sections.heading: CSIR NEERI Nagpur Project Associate I Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the post name for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The post name for this recruitment is Project Associate-I at CSIR-National Environmental Engineering Research Institute (CSIR-NEERI).

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available?
faq.answer: There is a total of 1 vacancy for the Project Associate-I position.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode is Walk-in. Candidates need to attend the interview directly.

faq.question: Q4. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview is scheduled for 09 July 2026.

faq.question: Q5. What is the required educational qualification?
faq.answer: The required educational qualification is M.Sc. in Microbiology/Biotechnology/Biochemistry from a recognized University with a minimum of 55% marks.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any experience required?
faq.answer: Experience in gene cloning will be preferred, but it is not strictly mandatory for all candidates.

faq.question: Q7. What is the age limit for the Project Associate-I post?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Project Associate-I post is 35 years.

faq.question: Q8. What is the salary offered for this position?
faq.answer: The salary offered is Rs. 31,000/- + HRA for NET/GATE qualified candidates and Rs. 25,000/- + HRA for others, per month.

faq.question: Q9. Is there any application fee?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST).

faq.question: Q10. Where is the interview venue?
faq.answer: The interview will be held at CSIR-National Environmental Engineering Research Institute (CSIR-NEERI), Nagpur, Maharashtra, 440020.
